glossary.proposed_definition: The process of identifying and ingesting adverse events affecting transportation services (delays, cancellations, etc.) from operational data sources
A system component responsible for receiving, processing, and coordinating responses to disruption events across multiple channels
The process of matching a normalized disruption event to a passenger booking/journey using deterministic matching strategies (service_no+date+origin/destination)
A distinct record representing a specific passenger journey affected by a disruption event, created upon successful event correlation with initial status 'Detected'
A standardized data structure for representing disruption events in normalized form with fields including event_type, service_no, service_date, origin, destination, effective_time_utc, and confidence
A unique identifier combining Case, channel, and template that ensures the same notification is never sent twice for the same combination
An individual traveler identified by a unique identifier with stored contact details and consent states across notification channels
The passenger designated as the primary contact for a booking reference and recipient of disruption notifications
The current permission level for a passenger on a specific contact channel, with values including 'opt_in' and 'opt_out'
A requirement ensuring that for a specific Case, channel, and template, exactly one outbound message is delivered to the passenger

features.business_story: As a disruption management system, I want to ingest raw disruption signals from carrier operations feeds and store them immutably with complete metadata, so that all disruption data is preserved for audit trails and cannot be lost or modified
features.description: System ingests disruption signals (delays, cancellations, etc.) from external sources, stores the raw event with immutable metadata

features.business_story: As a disruption orchestrator, I want to normalize heterogeneous disruption signals into a standardized canonical form, so that downstream systems can process events consistently regardless of their origin
features.description: Transforms raw disruption events into canonical event schema with standardized fields

features.business_story: As a passenger support system, I want to automatically correlate disruption events to passenger bookings using deterministic matching strategies, so that I can identify affected passengers without manual intervention
features.description: Correlates normalized disruption events to booking references using deterministic strategies

features.business_story: As a disruption management system, I want to create Cases for affected bookings and automatically compute their severity using versioned rulesets, so that passenger support can prioritize responses appropriately
features.description: Creates Cases for correlated disruptions with initial status tracking and severity computation

features.feature_name: Passenger Contact Consent and Channel Selection
features.business_story: As a compliant notification system, I want to respect passenger contact preferences and consent states when selecting notification channels, so that I only send messages through channels where passengers have opted in
features.description: Evaluates notification eligibility by checking passenger contact consent states

features.business_story: As a passenger notification system, I want to generate clear, actionable, and context-aware notifications for disruptions, so that passengers understand what happened and what they should do
features.description: Generates passenger-facing summary content including what changed, new expected times, and Case reference

features.business_story: As a notification platform, I want to dispatch notifications using versioned message templates for specific locales, so that messaging is consistent and can be managed centrally
features.description: Dispatches notifications using pre-defined message templates

features.business_story: As a notification system, I want to ensure that duplicate disruption signals never result in duplicate passenger notifications, so that passengers are not spammed with redundant messages
features.description: Implements deduplication using idempotency keys based on Case + channel + template combination

features.feature_name: Quiet Hours and Urgent Message Exemptions
features.business_story: As a respectful notification system, I want to honor quiet hours rules for different locales while allowing critical service notifications to bypass these restrictions, so that passengers are not disturbed during quiet hours unless the situation is urgent
features.description: Enforces locale-specific quiet hours rules with exceptions for service-critical messages

features.business_story: As an audit and compliance system, I want to maintain an immutable append-only timeline of all Case events, so that I can trace the complete history of how disruptions were detected, processed, and communicated
features.description: Maintains an append-only Case timeline with entries for each major event

scenarios.scenario_name: Successful delay detection, correlation, and single compliant SMS notification
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: Duplicate signal ingestion suppresses second notification via idempotency
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: Passenger with opt_out consent receives no notification
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: CANCELLATION disruption event creates Major severity Case
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: Multiple passengers on booking: notification sent only to lead contact
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: Service-critical notification bypasses quiet hours restrictions
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: Notification provider failure: system records dispatch attempt and error
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification
Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: Confidence score boundary: exactly 0.80 meets correlation threshold
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

scenarios.scenario_name: Deep link expiration: 120 minute deadline enforced
scenarios.feature: Disruption Detection, Correlation, and Passenger Notification

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous definition of severity computation criteria
findings.detail: Requirements state 'The Case severity is computed as Major using a versioned ruleset' but do not specify what inputs or conditions trigger 'Major' vs other severity levels
findings.recommendation: Define all valid severity levels and the decision tree/rules for each level

findings.finding_title: Missing definition of idempotency key composition algorithm
findings.detail: Idempotency keys are essential for preventing duplicates but the exact composition algorithm is unspecified
findings.recommendation: Define the exact algorithm (e.g., 'SHA256(case_id + ':' + channel + ':' + template_version)')

findings.finding_title: Critical Data Integrity Feature Required
findings.detail: Requirements explicitly mandate immutable storage of raw events with checksums and metadata preservation
findings.recommendation: Implement immutable event storage using append-only logs

findings.finding_title: Deterministic Correlation Engine Required
findings.detail: Correlation must be deterministic and repeatable using service_no+date+origin/destination strategy
findings.recommendation: Develop versioned correlation strategies with configurable parameters and match scoring

findings.finding_title: Versioned Severity Computation Required
findings.detail: Case severity is computed using versioned rulesets that enable rollback and auditability
findings.recommendation: Implement versioned ruleset engine with rule_version storage in Case records

findings.finding_title: Idempotency Key Strategy Essential
findings.detail: Deduplication using idempotency keys per Case + channel + template is critical for exactly-once delivery
findings.recommendation: Implement composite idempotency key: hash(Case_ID + channel + template_version)

findings.finding_title: Append-Only Timeline Enforcement Critical
findings.detail: Immutable append-only timeline is required for compliance and auditability
findings.recommendation: Implement append-only timeline with strict ordering and timestamp recording

findings.finding_title: Consent-Based Channel Selection Required
findings.detail: Consent-aware channel selection is critical for GDPR/privacy compliance
findings.recommendation: Store consent_state per contact per channel and evaluate before dispatch

findings.finding_title: Canonical Event Schema Must Be Enforced
findings.detail: Standardized canonical event schema is foundational for system interoperability
findings.recommendation: Define canonical schema in versioned specification and implement validation

findings.finding_title: Explicit Exactly-Once Delivery Requirement
findings.detail: System must guarantee exactly one notification per disruption per channel per template
findings.recommendation: Implement idempotency key-based deduplication with atomic check-and-send

findings.finding_title: Error handling strategy for failed event normalization not specified
findings.detail: Normalization failure behavior is undefined - error handling must be explicit
findings.recommendation: Define: raw event stored regardless, error logged, correlation NOT attempted, no Case created

findings.finding_title: Multi-leg journey correlation and notification strategy undefined
findings.detail: All scenarios use single-leg journeys but real bookings have multiple legs
findings.recommendation: Add comprehensive multi-leg requirements covering cascading impacts and Case scope

findings.finding_title: Notification retry and recovery strategy not defined
findings.detail: Provider failure retry strategy is completely undefined
findings.recommendation: Define automatic retry with exponential backoff, max attempts, and recovery logic

findings.finding_title: Idempotency key composition algorithm not formally specified
findings.detail: Exact composition algorithm is unspecified, creating implementation ambiguity
findings.recommendation: Formally specify: hash_algorithm(case_id + channel + template_name + template_version)

findings.finding_title: Duplicate detection strategy for same disruption signal unclear
findings.detail: Contradiction between immutability and duplicate handling - detection criterion undefined
findings.recommendation: Clarify: identify by raw_event_id; distinguish same signal vs same notification

findings.finding_title: Match score calculation algorithm for correlation not formally specified
findings.detail: Correlation scoring algorithm is unspecified, threshold is meaningless without it
findings.recommendation: Define: score = (sum_of_field_scores) / 4, threshold >= 0.80

findings.finding_title: Undefined context for 'reasons' field in correlation record
findings.detail: Correlation record includes 'reasons' field but no format or content specification
findings.recommendation: Define whether structured JSON, free text, or predefined enumeration

findings.finding_title: Missing definition of deep link revocation mechanism
findings.detail: Deep link constraint specifies 'is_revocable: true' but revocation mechanism is undefined
findings.recommendation: Define API endpoint, authorization rules, validation logic, and notification behavior

findings.finding_title: Unspecified composition of passenger-facing summary elements
findings.detail: Summary required elements listed but structure, format, and length constraints undefined
findings.recommendation: Create specification with element ordering, length limits, formatting, accessibility requirements

findings.finding_title: Missing specification of 'new expected departure time' calculation
findings.detail: Calculation formula not specified - arithmetic addition or operations estimate?
findings.recommendation: Explicitly specify: new_expected_time = scheduled_departure_utc + delay_minutes

findings.finding_title: Match strategy notation 'service_no+date+od' lacks definition
findings.detail: 'od' abbreviation not expanded, combination logic not specified
findings.recommendation: Define formally: 'od' = origin/destination pair, specify exact comparison logic

findings.finding_title: Undefined field 'match_score' threshold interpretation
findings.detail: Threshold >= 0.80 specified but score computation algorithm undefined
findings.recommendation: Define algorithm, whether it differs from event confidence, threshold ranges

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous 'Correlation ID' linkage mechanism
findings.detail: Correlation ID required but what events it links and how is undefined
findings.recommendation: Define when created, what it links, format, uniqueness guarantees

findings.finding_title: Missing definition of quiet hours exception criteria
findings.detail: Service-critical message classification criteria undefined
findings.recommendation: Define explicit criteria for what makes a message service-critical

findings.finding_title: Undefined semantics of Case status transitions
findings.detail: Only initial status 'Detected' defined; state machine undefined
findings.recommendation: Define all valid statuses, transition rules, entry/exit actions per status

findings.finding_title: Unspecified handling of multi-leg journeys in correlation
findings.detail: Single-leg correlation documented but multi-leg behavior undefined
findings.recommendation: Add requirements for multi-leg matching, Case scope, cascading impacts

findings.finding_title: Unspecified timezone handling in timestamp fields
findings.detail: Requirements mix UTC and unspecified timezone contexts
findings.recommendation: Create timestamp spec: internal UTC, external with offset, conversion rules

findings.finding_title: Secure Time-Bounded Deep Links Required
findings.detail: Deep links with 120-minute expiration and revocability required
findings.recommendation: Implement JWT-based links with TTL, revocation endpoint, access validation

findings.finding_title: Template Versioning and Localization Required
findings.detail: Template-locale pairing ensures consistent, professionally maintained messaging
findings.recommendation: Implement template versioning with per-locale support and startup validation

findings.finding_title: Locale-Specific Quiet Hours with Exemptions
findings.detail: Quiet hours configuration with service-critical bypass required
findings.recommendation: Implement per-locale config with timezone awareness and admin interface

findings.finding_title: Correlation ID Tracking for Request Tracing
findings.detail: Distributed tracing with correlation IDs for debugging
findings.recommendation: Generate on ingestion, propagate through stages, include in logs

findings.finding_title: Event Source Tracking with Provenance
findings.detail: Event source tracking enables source quality analysis
findings.recommendation: Store source_id for events, track reliability metrics

findings.finding_title: Unspecified handling when disruption Orchestrator stops mid-scenario
findings.detail: Failure recovery behavior undefined when orchestrator crashes during processing
findings.recommendation: Define watchdog timeout, recovery logic, and pending event handling

findings.finding_title: Handling when required message template does not exist
findings.detail: Template absence recovery outcome not specified
findings.recommendation: Define failure handling, retry window, escalation to support

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous computation of 'new expected departure time' from 95-minute delay
findings.detail: Calculation formula ambiguous - arithmetic addition vs operations estimate?
findings.recommendation: Explicitly state calculation method

findings.finding_title: Vague phrase 'what changed' lacks specificity for multi-leg journeys
findings.detail: Unclear whether summary applies per-leg or to entire booking
findings.recommendation: Clarify handling for multi-leg disruptions

findings.finding_title: Vague quantifier 'next steps' lacks specificity for delay vs. cancellation
findings.detail: 'Next steps' content differs by disruption type but not specified
findings.recommendation: Specify template-driven content based on disruption type

findings.finding_title: Contradiction between immutable raw event storage and duplicate ingestion handling
findings.detail: Contradiction: each ingestion creates distinct record, but also immutable
findings.recommendation: Clarify deduplication strategy for duplicate raw_event_id

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous idempotency key composition: does it include raw_event_id?
findings.detail: Key definition gap - how does duplicate detection work across reingest?
findings.recommendation: Explicitly define idempotency key and its relationship to raw_event_id

findings.finding_title: Undefined 'service-critical' classification for quiet hours exemption
findings.detail: Service-critical criteria undefined - event_type? severity? flag?
findings.recommendation: Define service-critical classification rules

findings.finding_title: Inconsistency: 'exactly 1 outbound message' vs. multi-leg journey consideration
findings.detail: Ambiguous whether 'exactly 1' applies per Case or per leg
findings.recommendation: Clarify scope for multi-leg journeys

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous timing of 'Case severity computed' relative to notification dispatch
findings.detail: Unclear whether severity is immutable or recomputed for duplicates
findings.recommendation: Specify: severity computed once upon correlation, immutable thereafter

findings.finding_title: Channel selection priority when both email and SMS are opt_in
findings.detail: Channel selection logic unpredictable when multiple channels available
findings.recommendation: Explicitly specify channel priority order

findings.finding_title: Match score calculation method for service_no+date+OD matching
findings.detail: Scoring algorithm unpredictable - affects correlation determinism
findings.recommendation: Define scoring explicitly: match_score = (matches / total_criteria)

findings.finding_title: Severity level thresholds for delay duration
findings.detail: Actual ruleset thresholds unspecified - 1min vs 1440min severity unclear
findings.recommendation: Publish active severity ruleset with explicit thresholds

findings.finding_title: Handling of Cases that already exist for same booking+service+date
findings.detail: Case idempotency rules undefined - create new or update existing?
findings.recommendation: Define Case query logic for duplicate detection

findings.finding_title: Definition of 'service-critical' for quiet hours exemption
findings.detail: Service-critical classification unpredictable
findings.recommendation: Define classification matrix with examples

findings.finding_title: Passenger locale preference and template locale matching
findings.detail: Fallback logic unpredictable when passenger locale template missing
findings.recommendation: Define locale resolution and fallback strategy

findings.finding_title: Handling when notification provider is temporarily unavailable
findings.detail: Retry mechanism undefined - automatic or manual?
findings.recommendation: Define retry strategy with backoff and max attempts

findings.finding_title: Consent state update between Case creation and notification dispatch
findings.detail: Timing of consent evaluation unpredictable - snapshot or real-time?
findings.recommendation: Define consent re-evaluation immediately before dispatch

findings.finding_title: Opt-out consent must completely block notification
findings.detail: Opt-out must block all notifications - GDPR compliance critical
findings.recommendation: Add explicit scenario: 'Opt-out consent blocks notification'

findings.finding_title: Confidence threshold boundary behavior is critical
findings.detail: Boundary conditions (0.79 vs 0.80) must be explicitly tested
findings.recommendation: Add boundary test scenarios for >= operator

findings.finding_title: Cancellation events require different notification than delays
findings.detail: Different event types require different severity rules and templates
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios for CANCELLATION and other disruption types

findings.finding_title: Multiple passengers on booking: notification sent to lead contact only
findings.detail: Multi-passenger behavior needs explicit specification
findings.recommendation: Add scenario with lead contact definition and secondary passenger handling

findings.finding_title: Quiet hours enforcement requires explicit time boundaries
findings.detail: Quiet hours rules undefined - time boundaries and service-critical criteria missing
findings.recommendation: Add explicit scenarios with time boundaries and criteria

findings.finding_title: Notification provider failure handling is unspecified
findings.detail: Retry logic, idempotency key handling, and failure outcomes undefined
findings.recommendation: Add provider failure scenarios with retry and recovery

findings.finding_title: Invalid event schema must be handled gracefully
findings.detail: Schema validation failure behavior undefined
findings.recommendation: Add scenario: raw event stored, normalization fails, no Case

findings.finding_title: Idempotency key structure must be deterministic and documented
findings.detail: Key format and determinism not documented
findings.recommendation: Add scenario verifying deterministic key generation

findings.finding_title: Email and SMS both opt-in: channel selection criteria undefined
findings.detail: Channel selection logic undefined when both channels available
findings.recommendation: Add scenario with channel priority definition

findings.finding_title: Secure deep link expiration enforcement is critical
findings.detail: Boundary testing needed for expiration and revocation
findings.recommendation: Add boundary test scenarios at T+119/120/121 minutes

findings.finding_title: Template version mismatch causes notification failure
findings.detail: Missing template version should fail, not fall back silently
findings.recommendation: Add scenario with explicit failure behavior

findings.finding_title: Locale mismatch: no template in passenger's language
findings.detail: Should fail, not send wrong language
findings.recommendation: Add scenario with locale resolution and fallback rules

findings.finding_title: Versioned severity rulesets enable reproducibility
findings.detail: Ruleset version changes affect severity computation
findings.recommendation: Add scenario showing v1 vs v2 ruleset differences

findings.finding_title: Consent state evaluation timing relative to notification dispatch not specified
findings.detail: GDPR compliance requires real-time consent evaluation, not snapshot
findings.recommendation: Add requirement: re-evaluate consent immediately before dispatch

findings.finding_title: Channel selection priority when multiple channels are opted-in not specified
findings.detail: Channel selection algorithm undefined
findings.recommendation: Define priority order: SMS > Email > Other

findings.finding_title: Service-critical classification criteria for quiet hours exception undefined
findings.detail: Load-bearing feature without specification
findings.recommendation: Define: event_type=CANCELLATION OR severity=Critical OR service_critical=true

findings.finding_title: Severity ruleset version and update mechanism not fully specified
findings.detail: Active ruleset, deployment mechanism, and re-evaluation logic undefined
findings.recommendation: Publish active ruleset with version, thresholds, deployment process

findings.finding_title: Locale fallback strategy when template not available in passenger's language undefined
findings.detail: Real-world scenario without specification - accessibility violation risk
findings.recommendation: Define fallback chain: exact locale → language → en-GB → fail

findings.finding_title: Calculation formula for 'new expected departure time' not formally specified
findings.detail: Simple but critical calculation undefined
findings.recommendation: Specify: new_expected_time = scheduled_departure_utc + delay_minutes

findings.finding_title: Passenger-facing summary content requirements incomplete and vague
findings.detail: Direct passenger-facing feature lacks complete specification
findings.recommendation: Define all elements, length constraints, formatting, accessibility requirements

findings.finding_title: Case state machine and status transitions not fully defined
findings.detail: Only initial 'Detected' status specified, full lifecycle undefined
findings.recommendation: Define full state machine with transitions and terminal states

findings.finding_title: Orchestrator failure recovery and resilience behavior undefined
findings.detail: Mid-process failure recovery not specified
findings.recommendation: Define heartbeat, pending event recovery, watchdog timeout

findings.finding_title: Cross-system authentication and authorization for deep links not specified
findings.detail: Security-critical feature lacks authentication specification
findings.recommendation: Add JWT-based auth, token validation, revocation mechanism
